hello@theendtv.co.uk
© The End TV Limited 2026
Capabilities

What We Do

Everything starts with an original concept and goes all the way to The End. Short form or long form. 90 seconds or 90 minutes. We build formats around your brief and deliver them completely.

Our approach

We treat brands like broadcasters.

You become the commissioner. We identify your challenge, understand your audience, and build an original format around your brief. Whether you need brand recognition, a shift in perception, or a new audience entirely, we come up with the concept and create the content that delivers it.

We are not a production company that takes a script and shoots it. We originate. Every project starts with us understanding your pain point and working out the most compelling format to solve it. Then we bring in the best directors and producers for that specific world, whether it is food, tech, cars, sport or anything else.

The result is content that feels made for an audience, not made for a brand. That is the difference.

01

Original Format & Content Production

We originate ideas. We do not adapt templates. Every format we create is built from scratch around your brief, your audience and your objectives. From a 90-second brand film to a six-part documentary series, the process is the same: find the concept that works, then make it brilliantly.

  • Format development
  • Concept and scripting
  • Pre-production
  • Multi-camera filming
  • Casting and talent
  • Post-production and delivery
  • Sizzle reels and teasers
  • Marketing plan support
02

Broadcast

We develop and produce series for UK broadcasters and global streaming platforms. Our team has spent two decades on both sides of the commissioning table, which means we know what gets a series made and how to deliver it.

We specialise in Advertiser Funded Programming, bringing brands and broadcasters together around content that works for both.

  • Format creation
  • Broadcaster pitching
  • AFP development
  • Pilot production
  • Showrunner services
  • Talent and casting
  • Studio and location production
  • International format adaptation
03

Brand Film & Live Production

Live events, product launches, multi-camera studio productions, internal communications, education and training. All of it made to the same broadcast standard as everything else we do. There is no such thing as a low-priority brief here.

  • Live event production
  • Multi-camera studio
  • Virtual and hybrid events
  • Product films
  • Internal communications
  • Education and training
  • Animation and motion graphics
  • Photography

© The End TV Limited 2026
Post-Production

The End Post

A full-service online post-production facility run by the same team behind some of the UK's biggest television productions. Professional, cloud-based, and built to work wherever your production takes you.

What we are

A post house without walls.

The End Post is entirely online. No expensive buildings, no fixed overheads, no geographic limitations. We pass those savings directly to you without ever compromising on the quality of the work.

What you get is the editorial rigour and expertise that shaped some of the most-watched programmes on British television, available to any production, anywhere in the world.

We support all major editing platforms and work on professional cloud infrastructure, meaning your team can access, edit and review full-resolution media in real time from anywhere. No proxies. No waiting. No compromise.

The infrastructure

Unlimited by design.

Our facility runs on professional cloud infrastructure with no limits on the number of users working simultaneously and no ceiling on the volume of media. One editor in London or a team across multiple countries. The workflow is identical.

  • Unlimited simultaneous users
  • Unlimited media and storage
  • Full-resolution remote access
  • Real-time global collaboration
  • Secure encrypted infrastructure
  • Media shared with clients for review
  • Four-point backup on all media
  • Frame.io integration for approvals
Avid Media Composer
Industry-standard broadcast editing for long-form and drama
Final Cut Pro
Fast flexible editing for branded content and multi-platform delivery
DaVinci Resolve
Professional colour grading and finishing to broadcast standards
Adobe Premiere Pro
Collaborative editing across the Creative Cloud ecosystem
How it works

From first day of filming to final delivery.

01

Planning & Workflow Design

Before a frame is shot we plan the entire post pipeline with your team. We discuss cameras, codecs and on-location data management, including filming for all aspect ratios so your content is ready for every platform from broadcast to social from the outset. We can provide data wranglers or advise your team so they can manage it themselves.

Image or video placeholder

02

Ingest & Media Management

Once filming wraps your media comes to us physically or digitally. We transcode it, organise it and store it in four places: cloud edit copy, cloud backup, physical backup and your own retained copy. Your media is always safe.

Image or video placeholder

03

Edit & Remote Collaboration

Your project is ready to edit from anywhere in the world. We can provide experienced editors and edit assistants to keep everything running smoothly and continuously, or your own team can work directly on the system. All they need is a laptop and an internet connection. The facility runs 24 hours a day, seven days a week, so production never has to stop.

Image or video placeholder

04

Review & Approvals

Cuts are shared via Frame.io for a clean professional viewing and feedback experience. No emailing files. No version confusion. Everyone sees the same cut, leaves notes in the same place and approvals happen efficiently.

Image or video placeholder

05

Grade, Mix & Final Delivery

Once the edit is locked we handle the full finishing pipeline. Colour grade, sound design and mix, titles, graphics and versioning. We are equally at home delivering to broadcast specifications or online platforms, and we subtitle and reformat content for every format and territory required. Trailers, clips and social cuts are all part of the service.

Image or video placeholder

In practice

Inside Sunday Riley

Post-production for Marlow Media

When Marlow Media commissioned a six-part branded series for Sunday Riley, they brought The End Post in to handle the complete post-production. Working remotely with the production team, we managed the full pipeline from ingest through to grade, mix and final delivery.

Editors and producers collaborated in real time across different locations, with the client reviewing and approving cuts remotely throughout. A seamless broadcast-quality series delivered entirely online.

Get started

Ready to bring your post online?

Whether you are a production company looking for a reliable post partner, or a brand wanting one supplier for everything, we would love to talk through what The End Post can do for your project.

© The End TV Limited 2026
Our story

Built on a Legacy of Television History

The producers and directors behind some of the biggest entertainment formats ever made in the UK.

From Broadcast to Brands.

The End TV was founded by the producers and directors behind some of the biggest entertainment juggernauts on television. From The X Factor and Big Brother to Saturday Night Takeaway, Celebs Go Dating and Dancing on Ice.

With a legacy in creating era-defining formats that captured tens of millions of viewers, we now bring that same storytelling craft and emotional intelligence to branded content, corporate film and post-production.

We partner with global brands including Red Bull, Checkatrade, Ezra Coaching, John Lewis and Samsung to create original formats and films that cut through, spark conversation and connect with audiences worldwide.

Through The End Post, we also offer broadcast-quality post-production to any production company or brand, anywhere in the world.

"Whatever we make, the goal is always the same. We want audiences to feel something. When the right content finds the right people, something genuinely changes. That is what we come to work for every day."
James Lessell — Founder, The End TV
The people behind the work

Leadership Team

The team at The End TV have worked with some of the most prestigious brands and networks in the world. What drives them is the work itself.

JL

James Lessell

Founder & Executive Producer

Over 25 years overseeing and producing some of the UK's most-watched entertainment. From The X Factor, Big Brother and Celebs Go Dating to producing for The Masked Dancer at Bandicoot Productions. James has also worked with Coca-Cola, Carling, Just Eat and Lidl.

When not working, he's training for his next marathon.
KP

Katie Pocket

Associate Producer

Katie works across development and production at The End TV, supporting James and the wider creative team from the earliest stages of a project through to delivery. She brings sharp organisational instincts and a genuine passion for storytelling to everything she works on.

The person who quietly makes everything possible.
JLB

Justin Lennox-Bradley

Executive Director

Director of some of the UK's most iconic programmes including Big Brother, Fame Academy and Love Island, alongside a strong portfolio for John Lewis, American Express, Microsoft and Samsung. His passion is ground-breaking technology combined with the art of visually stunning filmmaking.

When not directing: crafting his award-winning smoked foods.
DL

Danielle Lessell

Head of Operations

Danielle keeps everything running. Building relationships, aligning strategies and making complex productions deliver on time and on brief. Her genuine love for compelling content drives every project further than expected.

Two great passions: tennis, and Lola the dog.
